description:
# Project Timeline API

Add a project-scoped timeline endpoint combining EventLedger events and project artifacts into a unified, chronologically ordered feed.

## Phases
1. EventLedger project-scoped query + /api/projects/:slug/timeline route
2. Project artifact aggregation endpoint + combined project summary
title: [Epic] Project Timeline API
